queries.question: Provide a list of all football players and a list of all intermediate-level rugby players.
queries.sql:
SELECT Football_Players.PlayerName
FROM Fitness_Level JOIN Football_Players ON Fitness_Level.ID = Football_Players.Fitness_ID
UNION
SELECT Rugby_Players.PlayerName
FROM Fitness_Level JOIN Rugby_Players ON Fitness_Level.ID = Rugby_Players.Fitness_ID
WHERE Fitness_Level.Level = "Intermediate"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?fitness_level a :Fitness_Level .
    ?football_players a :Football_Players .
    ?football_players p:hasFitness_Level ?fitness_level .
    ?football_players p:PlayerName ?playername .
    BIND(?playername AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?fitness_level a :Fitness_Level .
    ?rugby_players a :Rugby_Players .
    ?rugby_players p:hasFitness_Level ?fitness_level .
    ?rugby_players p:PlayerName ?playername .
    ?fitness_level p:Level ?level_f .
    FILTER(STR(?level_f) = "Intermediate")
    BIND(?playername AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are the football players with an intermediate fitness level and the rugby players with an intermediate fitness level?
queries.sql:
SELECT Football_Players.PlayerName
FROM Fitness_Level JOIN Football_Players ON Fitness_Level.ID = Football_Players.Fitness_ID
WHERE Fitness_Level.Level = "Intermediate"
UNION
SELECT Rugby_Players.PlayerName
FROM Fitness_Level JOIN Rugby_Players ON Fitness_Level.ID = Rugby_Players.Fitness_ID
WHERE Fitness_Level.Level = "Intermediate"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?fitness_level a :Fitness_Level .
    ?football_players a :Football_Players .
    ?football_players p:hasFitness_Level ?fitness_level .
    ?football_players p:PlayerName ?playername .
    ?fitness_level p:Level ?level_f .
    FILTER(STR(?level_f) = "Intermediate")
    BIND(?playername AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?fitness_level a :Fitness_Level .
    ?rugby_players a :Rugby_Players .
    ?rugby_players p:hasFitness_Level ?fitness_level .
    ?rugby_players p:PlayerName ?playername .
    ?fitness_level p:Level ?level_f .
    FILTER(STR(?level_f) = "Intermediate")
    BIND(?playername AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide football players and rugby players with an intermediate fitness level.
